copy.description: Copies the file. The target isn't the directory to put it in, it's the actual file to create.

copyDirectory.description: Recursively copies the directory. The target is the actual directory to create, not the directory into which the new one should be placed.

createDirectory.description: Returns the new directory created at the file location, if directory doesn't already exist

deleteFileOrDirectory.description: Deletes the file or directory WITHOUT confirmation.

extractZipFile.signature: void extractZipFile(var targetDirectory, bool overwriteFiles, var callback)
extractZipFile.description: Extracts the ZIP archive if this file is a .zip file.

getBytesFreeOnVolume.description: Returns the number of bytes free on the drive that this file lives on.

getChildFile.description: Returns a child file if this is a directory.

getHash.description: Reads a file and generates the hash of its contents.

getNonExistentSibling.description: Returns a sibling file that doesn't exist.

getNumZippedItems.description: Returns the number of items in the zip file.

getParentDirectory.description: Returns the parent directory as File.

getRedirectedFolder.description: If this file is a folder that contains a HISE redirection file (LinkWindows / LinkOSX file), then it will return the redirection target, otherwise it will return itself.

getRelativePathFrom.description: Returns a relative path from the given other file.

getSize.description: Returns the size of the file in bytes.

hasWriteAccess.description: true if it's possible to create and write to this file. If the file doesn't already exist, this will check its parent directory to see if writing is allowed.

isChildOf.description: Checks if this file is a child file of the other file.

isDirectory.description: Checks if this file exists and is a directory.

isFile.description: Checks if this file exists and is a file.

isSameFileAs.description: Checks if the file matches the other file (the object comparison might not work reliably).

loadAsAudioFile.description: Loads the given file as audio file.

loadAsBase64String.description: Loads the binary file, compresses it with zstd and returns a Base64 string.

loadAsMidiFile.description: Loads the track (zero-based) of the MIDI file. If successful, it returns an object containing the time signature and a list of all events.

loadAsObject.description: Loads the given file as object.

loadAsString.description: Loads the given file as text.

loadAudioMetadata.description: Tries to parse the metadata from the audio file (channel amount, length, samplerate, etc) and returns a JSON object if sucessful.

loadEncryptedObject.description: Loads the encrypted object using the supplied RSA key pair.

loadFromXmlFile.description: Loads the XML file and tries to parse it as JSON object.

loadMidiMetadata.description: Tries to parse the metadata of the MIDI file and returns a JSON object if successful.

move.description: Moves the file. The target isn't the directory to put it in, it's the actual file to create.

setExecutePermission.description: Changes the execute-permissions of a file.

setReadOnly.description: Changes the read/write permission for the given file.

show.description: Opens a Explorer / Finder window that points to the file.

startAsProcess.description: Launches the file as a process.

toReferenceString.description: Returns a reference string with a wildcard.

toString.description: Returns a String representation of that file.

writeAsXmlFile.description: Replaces the XML file with the JSON content (needs to be convertible).

writeAudioFile.signature: bool writeAudioFile(var audioData, double sampleRate, int bitDepth)
writeAudioFile.description: Writes the given data (either a Buffer or Array of Buffers) to a audio file.

writeEncryptedObject.description: Encrypts an JSON object using the supplied key.

writeMidiFile.description: Writes the array of MessageHolders as MIDI file using the metadataObject to determine time signature, tempo, etc.

writeObject.description: Replaces the file content with the JSON data.

writeString.description: Replaces the file content with the given text.
